---
title: "A Sense Of Getting Closer"
author: "max cooper"
custom-field: "conner griffith"
date: "2026-02-05"
categories: [music video, generative]
tags: [max cooper, conner griffith]
image: "thumbnail.jpg"
---

{{< video https://youtu.be/4jaHcz3d85w >}}

Music: Max Cooper  
Video: Conner Griffith
